'''Lost City''' is a quest about the fairy land [[Zanaris]]. A group of adventurers have set up camp in [[Lumbridge Swamp]], claiming to be searching for the mystical lost city. You must find the truth of this claim, and gain entrance to the moon of [[Gielinor]], Zanaris.

==Details==
{{Quest details
|description = Can you find the legendary lost city of [[Zanaris]]?
|start = Go to [[Lumbridge Swamp]]. Talk to the campers there.
|startmap = 3150,3205
|difficulty = Intermediate
|length = Short
|requirements = *{{SCP|Crafting|31|link=yes}} {{Boostable|yes}} {{Questreqstart|no}}
*{{SCP|Woodcutting|36|link=yes}} {{Boostable|yes}} {{Questreqstart|no}}
*Ability to kill a level 101 [[Tree spirit (Lost City)|Tree spirit]] with limited [[armour]] and [[weapons]].
|items = * [[Knife]]
* [[Woodcutting]] [[axe]] (you will need to bank the axe before accessing [[Entrana]] - you cannot use a blessed axe)
|recommended = * {{SCP|Combat|45|link=yes}}
*[[Weight-reducing clothing]] and [[Stamina potion|stamina]] or [[energy potion]]s
*[[Food]] (armour is not allowed on Entrana)
*If using [[Magic]] for the [[Entrana Dungeon]] (recommended):
** {{SCP|Magic|13 }} [[Magic]] and enough runes to cast [[Fire Strike]] for the [[Tree spirit (Lost City)|Tree Spirit]] which has a 35% Fire weakness OR
**{{SCP|Magic|39}} [[Magic]] and enough runes to cast [[Crumble Undead]] against the Zombies and the [[Tree spirit (Lost City)|Tree Spirit]], who are susceptible to it (about 65 casts should be enough)
** A [[Celastrus bark]] to fletch into a [[battlestaff]] for the added Magic bonus (requires {{SCP|Fletching|40}} [[Fletching]])
* If using [[Melee]] for the [[Entrana Dungeon]]:
** [[Prayer potion]] (Prayer is almost fully drained when entering the dungeon)
** [[Ring of recoil|Rings of recoil]]
*If using [[Ranged]] as an alternative to Magic against the Zombies (not recommended for the Tree spirit):
**[[Arrows]], [[bow string]] and an [[unstrung bow]]
*Fast travel to several locations:
**[[Lumbridge Swamp]] to start the quest (plus one additional trip) - [[Necklace of passage]] or [[Ring of the elements]] or [[Amulet of glory]] or [[Lumbridge Teleport]]
**[[Entrana]] (1 trip) - [[Monk of Entrana]] on the second northern dock at [[Port Sarim]] or [[Balloon transport system]].
**An instant [[teleport]] to leave the [[Entrana Dungeon]] (the only alternative is to leave via the Magic Door to level 32 wilderness)
|kills = * [[Tree spirit (Lost City)|Tree Spirit]] ''(level 101)'' (Safespottable)  
* Multiple [[Zombie (Entrana Dungeon)|Zombies]] ''(level 25)'' (for a [[bronze axe]])

</poem>
}}

==Walkthrough==
===Searching for Zanaris===
{{Map|name=Warrior|x=3150|y=3205|plane=0|r=4|mtype=square|caption=The start point.|align=right|width=200|height=200}}
{{Needed|A [[woodcutting axe]]}}
[[File:Warrior (Lost City) chathead.png|left]]
Head to the north-western edge of the [[Lumbridge Swamp]], just south of [[Draynor Village]], where you will find an [[Adventurers' Camp (Lumbridge Swamp)|adventurers' camp]]. Ask the [[Warrior (Lost City)|warrior]] why he is camped out here, and he will let it slip that he is searching for [[Zanaris]]. Ask who's Zanaris, and he will also let it slip that Zanaris is actually a hidden magical city. Finally, after asking him how he plans to find it, and then observing that it looks like he doesn't know, he will accidentally reveal that there is a [[leprechaun]] hiding in a nearby tree who knows how to get to [[Zanaris]].

Look for a nearby tree that only has a "Chop" option instead of a "Chop down" option. Chop it and a leprechaun named [[Shamus]] will pop out. Shamus will mention that the player will need to visit the shed in the swamp; ask him how Zanaris fits in a shed, and he will tell you that the doorway is a portal. However, to enter the portal you will first need a Dramenwood staff, crafted from a [[Dramen tree]], found only in the [[Entrana Dungeon]].

[[File:Lost City - Chop Tree.png|thumb|left|220px|"Chop", instead of "Chop down."]]
{{Clear}}
===The island of Entrana===
{{Needed|A [[knife]]|recommended=[[Runes]], a [[teleport]], [[Food]], and a [[prayer potion]] if necessary|skills={{SCP|Woodcutting|36}} {{Boostable|yes}} to chop the [[Dramen tree]]}}
[[Monk of Entrana|Monks of Entrana]] do not allow [[armour]] or [[weapons]] on [[Entrana]], but you can take:
* Items to make armour, such as a [[needle]], [[thread]], and [[dragonhide]] or [[leather]]
* Some clothing options, such as [[H.A.M. robes|H.A.M Robes]] and full [[graceful]]
* [[Celastrus bark]] to make a [[battlestaff]]
* A [[knife]] and [[logs]] (or unstrung [[bow]]), and a [[bow string]] to make a [[bow]]
* [[Arrows]]
* [[Runes]] (for [[combat]] and [[teleports]])
* [[Potions]]
* [[Food]]
* [[Jewellery]]
* [[God book]]s
* [[Blessings]]

{{Map|caption=The route on [[Entrana]] to reach the dungeon.|align=right|width=250|height=250|mtype:line,2833:3335,2845:3335,2848:3338,2855:3338,2855:3340,2858:3340,2859:3341,2859:3355,2856:3358,2856:3373,2854:3375,2842:3375,2840:3374,2820:3374,stroke-width:4|mtype:pin,2820:3374,title:[[Entrana Dungeon]]}}

Head to [[Port Sarim]] and find the [[Monks of Entrana]], south of the [[Rusty Anchor Inn]] on the second jetty. Use the nearby [[bank deposit box]] to store your axe if you still have it, and any other gear that violates the restrictions of [[Entrana]]. Speak to one of the monks to travel to [[Entrana]]. On arrival head east around the church, then north over the bridge. West of the bridge you will find a [[cave monk]] next to a dungeon entrance.

:'''Note:''' When you enter the dungeon, your Prayer will be reduced to nearly 0. Make sure not to have crafted any weapons before climbing down the ladder, or you will be kicked off the island.

Climb down into the dungeon, and kill the [[Zombie (Entrana Dungeon)|zombies]] (level 25) until one of them drops a [[bronze axe]]. There is a [[safespot]] by the mushrooms against the west wall, and another by the small group of mushrooms in the southern part of the zombie area. 

:'''Note:''' If using the [[Crumble Undead]] spell to fight zombies, make sure to save runes for 20-30 casts against the [[Tree spirit (Lost City)|Tree spirit]] later. 

Once you have obtained an axe, head south through the cave until you see some [[greater demon]]s and a small cave off to the south. 

:'''{{Colour|red|Warning}}: Do not go through the magical door to the east, it takes you to level 32 wilderness'''. 

Run past the demons to the south, and chop the [[Dramen Tree]] found inside ({{SCP|Woodcutting|36}}) - a level 101 [[Tree spirit (Lost City)|tree spirit]] will appear.

===Fighting the tree spirit===
{{Needed|skills={{SCP|Crafting|31}} {{Boostable|yes}} to craft a [[dramen staff]]}}
[[File:Dramen_tree.gif|thumb|100px|left|The Dramen tree.]]
{{Map|3204,3169|r=3|mtype=square|caption=Entrance to Zanaris.|align=right|width=200|height=200}}

If using [[Magic]] or [[Ranged]], you can utilise a [[safespot]] by cutting the tree from the south, then running inbetween the three mushrooms to the south-west once the tree spirit spawns.

:{{Color|red|Warning:}} The tree spirit will respawn after cutting the tree again if you kill it from outside of the room.

:'''Note''': [[Rings of recoil]] can be used and other players can assist in the kill, but the questing player must deal at least 1 damage themselves for the kill to count.

Once you've defeated the tree spirit, cut the tree again to get a [[Dramen branch]], then use a [[knife]] on it to make the [[Dramen staff]] ({{SCP|Crafting|31}}).

:'''Tip:''' A dramen branch is required for the [[Freeing Sir Amik Varze]] subquest of [[Recipe for Disaster]], and another is useful for the smuggling into [[Thorvald]]'s trial in [[The Fremennik Trials]], but do not make them into staves yet. Cutting at least three branches is recommended.

'''Teleport out''' and head to the [[Shed (Lumbridge Swamp)|tool shed]] in the centre of [[Lumbridge Swamp]]. Equip the Dramen staff before entering, and upon opening the door you'll find yourself in [[Zanaris]].

'''Congratulations, quest complete!''' 

[[File:Tree spirit (Lost City) safespot.png|thumb|left|250px|A safespot for ranging or casting magic on the Tree Spirit.]]

{{Clear}}

==Rewards==
{{Quest rewards
|name = Lost City
|image = [[File:Lost City reward scroll.png|centre]]
|qp = 3
|rewards = 
*Access to [[Zanaris]]
*Ability to buy and wield [[dragon longsword]]s and [[dragon dagger]]s (with level 60 [[Attack]])
*Ability to make [[cosmic rune]]s with the [[Runecraft]] skill
*A permanent portal to [[Puro-Puro]] in the wheat field east of the [[fairy ring]] in [[Zanaris]].

Unlocks:
* [[Tree spirit]] accessible in the [[Nightmare Zone]].
}}

==Required for completing==
Completion of Lost City is required for the following:
* [[Fairytale I - Growing Pains]]
* [[Heroes' Quest]]
* [[Lunar Diplomacy]]
* [[Freeing Sir Amik Varze]]
* [[Lumbridge & Draynor Medium Diary]]
* [[Lumbridge & Draynor Hard Diary]]
* [[Slayer Master]] [[Chaeldar]]
